ci_support_linux_64_localear-SA.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
locale:
- ar-SA
python_min:
- '3.10'
name: jupyterlab-language-pack-zh-tw
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "jupyterlab-language-pack" %}
{% set version = "4.5.post2" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}-{{ locale|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install "./{{ locale }}" -vv --no-deps

requirements:
  host:
    - hatchling >=1.4.0
    - jupyterlab-translate >=1.2.0
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}

test:
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}
  commands:
    - pip check

about:
  home: https://github.com/jupyterlab/language-packs
  summary: JupyterLab {{ locale }} Language Pack
  license: BSD-3-Clause
  license_family: BSD
  license_file: {{ locale }}/LICENSE.txt
  doc_url: https://jupyterlab.readthedocs.io/
  dev_url: https://github.com/jupyterlab/language-packs

extra:
  feedstock-name: jupyterlab-language-packs
  recipe-maintainers:
    - blink1073
    - fcollonval
    - goanpeca
    - krassowski
